default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance and upcoming content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Impressions up, clicks slightly down week-over-week, but month-over-month metrics remain positive](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New content cluster on foreign registration and Nexus rules requires careful handling due to legal nuances](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Mike to review draft article for new cluster and provide feedback by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Team to notify Mike when Nexus rule articles go live for spot-checking](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Publishing 26 articles this week, matching last week's output](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Site-wide: Impressions up, clicks slightly down week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Blog performance: Similar trend, with last week's high click rate appearing to be an anomaly](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Mike emphasized not to worry about week-to-week fluctuations unless part of a longer trend](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Team to focus on month-over-month metrics and only flag significant week-to-week changes](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### New Content Cluster: Foreign Registration and Nexus Rules

  - [Draft article shared for review](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Cluster requires more editorial quality and careful handling due to legal complexities](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Only 8 states have written Nexus rules directly related to the Secretary of State](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [6 states require state registration for payroll withholding or sales tax applications](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Most states base rules on case law, creating a gray area in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Team to be cautious about providing specific advice, focusing on general overviews and official sources](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Mike to review the draft article for the new cluster today](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Team to implement any changes based on Mike's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [For Nexus rule articles, Mike requested to be notified when they go live for spot-checking](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Possibility of shorter articles with links to official state pages for safety](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Additional Context on Nexus Rules

  - [Mike mentioned a comprehensive document on Nexus rules from a reputable source](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Document is highly technical and not suitable for direct use in content](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Mike will share the document with the team for background information](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review draft article for new cluster and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Team to await Mike's feedback before proceeding with other articles in the cluster](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Implement a process to notify Mike when Nexus rule articles go live](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Team to incorporate Mike's insights on Nexus rules into content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance, focusing on month-over-month trends](https://fathom.video/share/yK72_n_yqABRzHS_h6XzxAEkyW8_eZ6h?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

action_items.description: Review foreign registration & Nexus rules cluster draft; provide feedback by end of week
Set up process to notify Mike when new Nexus rules cluster articles go live for spot-checking
Find & send Nexus rules doc from external source to team
